$comment: AI-model catalog for the 'ultra' tier — 48-96GB-class WORKSTATION GPUs above the 5090's 32GB 'max' tier (RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell 96GB, RTX 6000 Ada / A6000 48GB, RTX PRO 5000 48/72GB, AMD Radeon PRO W7900 48GB, or 2x homogeneous cards pooled via LM Studio layer-split). The win over 'max': 70B/72B run FULLY in VRAM (no CPU offload) at 48GB; 96GB adds full-Q8 70B, dense 104B/123B, and gpt-oss-120B MoE resident. Models with min_vram_gb only fit ~96GB (or 2x48 pooled) — distro-ai-model/-detect-tier gate them by detected VRAM. DATACENTER GPUs (H100/H200/B200/MI300X/Gaudi) are NOT this tier — distro-ai-detect-tier routes them to Server mode. All repos web-verified 2026-07.

qwen2.5-coder-32b.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct
qwen2.5-coder-32b.note: Best GGUF coder; on ultra you can bump to Q8_0 (~35GB) for higher fidelity — still fits 48GB.

llama3.3-70b.name: Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct
llama3.3-70b.note: The headline ultra win: 42.5GB fits FULLY in a 48GB card's VRAM — no CPU offload (unlike the max tier's 0.8 offload). Full GPU speed.

llama3.3-70b-q8.name: Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct (Q8_0, near-fp16 quality)
llama3.3-70b-q8.note: 96GB-class only. Q8_0 ~75GB resident for near-fp16 quality.

gpt-oss-120b.name: OpenAI gpt-oss-120b (MoE, 117B/5.1B active, native MXFP4)
gpt-oss-120b.note: 96GB single card (or 2x48 pooled). The model ships natively in MXFP4, so the F16 single file (gpt-oss-120b-F16.gguf, 65.4GB) IS that native precision — 'MXFP4' is not a resolvable lms @tag; use @F16 (or @UD-Q4_K_XL to shrink). MoE — use LM Studio/llama.cpp LAYER split for multi-GPU, NOT tensor-parallel (MoE breaks TP).

qwen2.5-32b.name: Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct
qwen2.5-32b.note: Balanced general model; fits 48GB with room for large context.

mistral-large-123b.name: Mistral-Large-Instruct-2411 (123B dense)
mistral-large-123b.note: 96GB-class. Q4_K_M ~73GB fits a single 96GB card fully (Q6_K ~100GB needs 2x cards).

dolphin-mixtral-8x7b.name: Dolphin 2.7 Mixtral 8x7B (uncensored MoE)
dolphin-mixtral-8x7b.note: Uncensored MoE; fits 48GB comfortably (unlike the max tier where it was at the edge of 32GB).

qwen2.5-vl-72b.name: Qwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct (vision)
qwen2.5-vl-72b.note: Largest supported vision model. Q4_K_M ~41GB weights + required mmproj + KV is too tight for a bare 48GB card driving a display, so min_vram_gb=48 makes 'use vision' auto-fall-back to VL-32B there; it auto-selects on 96GB / 2x48 pooled. Load it explicitly (use vision best) to force it on 48GB.

qwen2.5-vl-32b.name: Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct (vision)
qwen2.5-vl-32b.note: Lighter vision option; fits 48GB with headroom. Pulls its mmproj automatically.

flux1-dev.name: FLUX.1-dev
flux1-dev.note: Best image gen. GATED (HF token). ComfyUI on 8188, ample VRAM headroom on ultra.

flux1-schnell.name: FLUX.1-schnell (fp8)
flux1-schnell.note: Apache-2.0, no token. Default when no HF token.
